introSection: Teddy Bear was a wooden roller coaster previously located at Kennywood in West Mifflin, Pennsylvania, USA. The ride was designed by Herbert Paul Schmeck and built by the Philadelphia Toboggan Company.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride opened in 1935.

The ride was removed at the end of the 1947 season to make way for a new midway.

fullText:
Teddy Bear was a wooden roller coaster previously located at Kennywood in West Mifflin, Pennsylvania, USA. The ride was designed by Herbert Paul Schmeck and built by the Philadelphia Toboggan Company.

The ride opened in 1935.

The ride was removed at the end of the 1947 season to make way for a new midway.
